observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the runner preserves the exact declared-check denominator and reports whether any owner process started
observed_failure.observed_result: a current compiler-valid owner with two semantic checks was blocked as missing, and a process that completed before sidecar persistence failed was reported with process_started=false and execution_count=0

classification.owner: SkillGuard TestMesh owner execution and check runner
classification.error_signature: current_test_mesh_owner_check_missing / post-launch owner_execution_error reported as not-run

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the runner collapsed an owner to owner_checks[0] and later asserted one manifest check per owner; its exception path inferred process_started only from a result record that post-launch persistence failure prevented
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model and regression matrix had included two semantic checks sharing one compiler-derived owner plus an injected durable-sidecar failure after an observable process side effect
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: freeze all check projections per owner and preserve process-start observation independently of terminal record persistence
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: current TestMesh plan -> owner_execution_only -> single-flight check runner -> immutable owner receipt -> aggregation

generalized_repair.rule: one owner may execute once for several identical semantic projections only when every projection is frozen and aggregation-visible; every successful process launch remains counted even when later evidence persistence fails
generalized_repair.observed_regression: shared owner with check:intake and check:review executes once and aggregates both projections
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: removing one frozen projection blocks before execution; injected post-launch sidecar failure reports failed/process_started/one execution and no success receipt
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair does not merge non-identical commands, broaden the owner set, add a second executor, or make failed persistence reusable

revalidation_evidence.declared_check_supervision_flowguard: passed scenario, contract, refinement, loop, progress, and exact known-bad reviews
revalidation_evidence.validation_composition_flowguard: 19/19 positive gates and 7/7 known-bad gates passed

claim_boundary: The source repair is validated for shared-owner projection, omission rejection, repeated single-flight reuse, same-plan aggregation, and post-launch process accounting. Installation, router refresh, downstream target recompilation, and the one final full owner remain outside this work package.
